clipboard.title: Clipboard
clipboard.history_empty: History is empty. Copy text or image to start.
clipboard.friend_required: Confirm {device} as a friend to view its clipboard.
clipboard.remote_empty: No clipboard entries loaded for {device}. Use {action} to request them.
clipboard.remote_friends_only: Remote clipboard is available only for confirmed friends.
clipboard.remote_text_note: Shown as received from the remote clipboard catalog. It may be shortened.
clipboard.remote_image_note: Preview quality only. Original remote clipboard image is not available.
clipboard.remove_history_text: Delete this text entry from history?
clipboard.remove_history_image: Delete this image entry from history?

duplicate_instance.title: Landa is already running
duplicate_instance.message: Another instance of Landa is already running on this device. Close it before starting again.

menu.title: Menu
menu.no_shared_videos: No shared video files available. Add shared files first.
menu.set_video_password: Set a web-link password in Settings.
menu.video_link_stop_failed: Failed to stop video link sharing: {error}
menu.stop_video_link_message: The active video link will stop working until you publish a file again.

incoming_download_requests.title: Download requests
incoming_download_requests.message: Device "{requester}" wants to download {kind} from you: {summary}
incoming_download_requests.whole_share_source: The full shared folder "{label}" will be sent.

incoming_access_requests.title: Shared access requests
incoming_access_requests.message: Device "{requester}" wants access to your shared files.
incoming_access_requests.note: After approval, the current file snapshot will be sent.

device.rename_helper: Name is bound to device MAC address.

share_sheet.add_shared_folder_description: Create lightweight cache index for folder
share_sheet.add_shared_files_description: Create lightweight cache index for files

friends_sheet.title: Friends
friends_sheet.description: Friendship requires confirmation from both devices.
friends_sheet.empty_friends:
No friends yet.
Open a device menu and send a friend request.

history_sheet.empty: Download history is empty for now.

empty.title: No devices found yet
empty.description: Make sure you are on the same Wi-Fi / LAN and refresh.

remote_download.title: Download from network
remote_download.status_downloading_message: Transfer started. Files are already downloading.
remote_download.access_description: Request access from the selected device to load the current shared file tree.
remote_download.empty_no_devices: No network devices with the app are currently available.
remote_download.empty_no_files: This device has no available files in the selected mode yet.
remote_download.empty_request_access: Request access from the selected device first.
remote_download.file_list_capped: Showing first {shown} files (hidden: {hidden}) for stable browsing.

files.title: Files
files.remove_shared_message: The {subject} "{name}" will be removed from shared access.
files.no_shared_content: No shared folders/files to re-cache yet.
files.no_shared_content_selected: Selected folder has no shared files to re-cache.
files.recache_scope_all: Re-cache will rebuild indexes for all shared folders/files.
files.recache_scope_selected: Re-cache will rebuild indexes only in: {path}
files.recache_success: Before cache: {before} files, after re-cache: {after} files.
files.viewer_pdf_unavailable: PDF preview/viewing is temporarily unavailable. Open the file externally to view it.
files.viewer_unsupported: This file type is not supported by the built-in viewer yet.
files.viewer_video_open_failed:
Cannot open video in built-in player.
{error}
files.viewer_video_platform_open_failed:
Cannot open video in built-in player on this platform.
{error}
files.viewer_audio_open_failed:
Cannot open audio in built-in player.
{error}

settings.title: Settings
settings.network_section_description: Configure background discovery and fallback behavior for routed or virtual networks.
settings.background_scan_description: The interval controls automatic scanning. Use Refresh for an immediate update.
settings.discovery_targets_description: Fallback for virtual or routed networks where auto-discovery may not work. Landa will send discovery packets only to the listed IPv4 addresses.
settings.discovery_targets_empty: The list is empty. Add virtual-network device IP addresses if they are not detected automatically.
settings.download_attempt_notifications_descripti: Show a system notification when a device requests your files.
settings.window_section_description: Landa interface and behavior settings on this device.
settings.left_handed_mode_description: The hamburger menu and side panel move to the left side.
settings.use_standard_download_folder: Download to the standard Landa folder
settings.use_standard_download_folder_description: If disabled, Windows and Linux will ask for a destination folder before downloading from shared folders.
settings.minimize_to_tray_description: The window hides to the tray and the app keeps running in the background.
settings.preview_cache_description: 0 = unlimited. If age = 0, files stay forever and are removed only by the size limit.
settings.clipboard_history_description: Maximum entries in local history. 0 = unlimited.
settings.recache_description: Number of workers used for cache rebuild. 0 = auto (by CPU).
settings.diagnostics_description: debug.log helps investigate shared-download issues and runtime failures.
settings.debug_log_retained_lines: How many last lines to keep in debug.log
settings.access_description: Used for video access by link from the menu.
settings.validation_non_negative_entries: Enter a non-negative number of entries.
settings.validation_non_negative_workers: Enter a non-negative number of workers.
settings.validation_positive_lines: Enter a positive number of lines.
settings.validation_add_ip_failed: Failed to add the IP address.

nearby_transfer.title: Nearby transfer
nearby_transfer.waiting_for_peer: Waiting for the second device to connect.
nearby_transfer.scan_or_select: Scan the QR code or choose a device from the list below.
nearby_transfer.devices_empty: No suitable devices are visible yet.
nearby_transfer.verify_code_send: Ask the other device to confirm this code:
nearby_transfer.offer_waiting: Connection established. Waiting for the connected device to send the file list.
nearby_transfer.offer_description: Choose files to download. Preview is available for supported formats.
nearby_transfer.preview_truncated: Preview is limited to the first 64 KB.
nearby_transfer.preview_image_failed: Unable to open the image preview.
nearby_transfer.preview_unsupported: Preview is unavailable for this file.
